case_title: BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS LLC VS. SAUL CHAVEZ

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS LLC SERVED JAN-31-2012, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, SAUL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 424 ELLIS STREET, #608, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, SAUL DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS -AS TO DEFENDANT SAUL CHAVEZ.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS LLC SERVED JAN-31-2012, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, SAUL
DECLARATION OF OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS LLC
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, SAUL
